description_long: This is a large, two-story bungalow with a symmetrical facade, featuring two prominent front-facing wings and a central entrance. The exterior is characterized by a light-colored finish, a gabled roof with multiple slopes, and a spacious driveway leading up to the house. The property is surrounded by manicured green lawns and is bordered by several mature trees, providing a sense of privacy and shade. The front of the bungalow includes a covered porch area supported by columns, and the windows are arranged in a balanced, grid-like pattern across both floors. The rear of the house opens onto a backyard area, with additional trees lining the perimeter. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern residential architecture, suitable for a suburban neighborhood.
description: A spacious, two-story bungalow with a symmetrical facade, gabled roof, covered porch, and balanced window arrangement, surrounded by lawns and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central entrance, covered porch, driveway, and two prominent wings with trees flanking the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gabled roof structure, and the arrangement of trees along the side and rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, rear windows, and a line of trees providing privacy at the back of the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, side lawn, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
